English Guide

# Seedance 2.0 Pricing: Convert 46 CNY per Million Tokens to Cost per Second

Seedance 2.0 uses token-based video pricing. This guide converts 46 CNY per million tokens into per-second and per-video costs for pure generation and video editing.

C

Crazyrouter Team

May 25, 2026 / 284 views

Share: Copy link

Seedance 2.0 Pricing: Convert 46 CNY per Million Tokens to Cost per Second

Crazyrouter

[Check live pricing](https://crazyrouter.com/pricing?utm_source=blog&utm_medium=internal&utm_campaign=seedance-2-0-pricing-token-to-second-cost-2026&utm_content=top_pricing_cta&utm_term=pricing) [Read the docs](https://docs.crazyrouter.com/introduction?
utm_source=blog&utm_medium=internal&utm_campaign=seedance-2-0-pricing-token-to-second-cost-2026&utm_content=top_docs_cta&utm_term=docs) [Open image tool](https://image.crazyrouter.com/?utm_source=blog&utm_medium=internal&utm_campaign=seedance-2-0-pricing-token-to-second-cost-2026&utm_content=top_image_cta&utm_term=image) 

## Seedance 2.0 Pricing: From Million Tokens to Cost per Second \#

Seedance 2.0 pricing is easy to misunderstand because the official number is expressed as CNY per million tokens, while product teams usually budget AI video by seconds or clips. Here is the practical conversion.

Seedance 2.0 pricing cover

## What the official token pricing means \#

Official reference: pure generation is 46 CNY per 1,000,000 tokens; video editing is 28 CNY per 1,000,000 tokens. A 15-second Seedance 2.0 video is reported at about 308,880 tokens. That means 20,592 tokens per second. Pure generation: 20,592 / 1,000,000 × 46 = 0.947 CNY per second.
Editing: 20,592 / 1,000,000 × 28 = 0.577 CNY per second.

## The per-second formula \#

text Copy

```
tokens_per_second = 308,880 / 15 = 20,592
pure_generation_per_second = 20,592 / 1,000,000 × 46 = 0.947 CNY
editing_per_second = 20,592 / 1,000,000 × 28 = 0.577 CNY
```

## Cost table by duration \#

|Duration |Estimated tokens |Pure generation |Video editing |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|1 sec |20,592 |0\.95 CNY |0\.58 CNY |
|5 sec |102,960 |4\.74 CNY |2\.88 CNY |
|10 sec |205,920 |9\.47 CNY |5\.77 CNY |
|15 sec |308,880 |14\.21 CNY |8\.65 CNY |
|30 sec |617,760 |28\.42 CNY |17\.30 CNY |
|60 sec |1,235,520 |56\.83 CNY |34\.59 CNY |

Seedance 2.0 token to second pricing calculator

## Pure generation vs video editing \#

Pure generation is best for creating a new clip from text, image, or audio references. Editing mode is cheaper because it reuses an existing video reference and changes part of the workflow.
If your product supports iteration, editing mode can reduce model [cost](https://crazyrouter.com/pricing) by about 39%.

## How to budget a Seedance 2.0 product \#

For SaaS pricing, do not charge only the raw model cost. Add retry rate, failed generations, storage, CDN bandwidth, queue priority, payment fees, support cost, and margin. A practical product price is often 1.5x to 3x the raw model cost depending on success rate and customer value.

Seedance 2.0 video generation pricing workflow

## API availability and caveats \#

Published pricing is useful for budgeting, but production access can depend on account region, provider availability, enterprise approval, resolution, queue tier, and current API rollout. Always verify the latest provider console before committing customer pricing.

## FAQ \#

### How much is Seedance 2.0 per second? \#

About 0.95 CNY per second for pure generation and 0.58 CNY per second for editing, based on the 15-second token reference.

results.title: BytePlus Review: Seedance 2.0 Turns BytePlus Into a Serious AI Video Platform - Kingy AI
excerpts:
0 is introduced as available on BytePlus, including official API access, and the workflow moves directly into the ModelArk interface, Playground, Media section, model settings, generation controls, and output configuration. The demo also highlights 1080p generation, video extension, smart lengthening, character consistency, and 15-second outputs. Most importantly, the conclusion from the hands-on test is that the outputs were strong on the first attempt, with no rerolls needed in the showcased generations.

For me, that is the headline of this BytePlus review: BytePlus is becoming a practical production layer for AI-native media generation. The platform is not only selling access to a model. It is wrapping that model in a developer platform, pricing/resource packs, documentation, API keys, authentication, Playground testing, and broader cloud services. The official ModelArk docs include [video generation API pages](https://docs.byteplus.

...

com/en/docs/ModelArk/1287899) and that users can call ModelArk models or applications through OpenAI-compatible multi-language community SDKs. Another official page says [ModelArk APIs are largely compatible with the OpenAI SDK](https://docs.byteplus.com/en/docs/ModelArk/1277873) , allowing integration with minimal code changes.

That is a smart move. Developers do not want every AI platform to require a completely new integration pattern. If a team already has an OpenAI-style client architecture, a compatible API surface makes BytePlus easier to test. It does not guarantee effortless migration in every case, but it does lower the psychological and engineering barrier.

The [video generation API structure](https://docs.byteplus.com/en/docs/ModelArk/1546123) also makes sense. BytePlus separates task creation, retrieval, listing, and cancellation/deletion. For AI video, asynchronous task handling is normal because video generation can take time.
A task-based API model is practical for dashboards, queues, background workers, content pipelines, and user-facing products where the UI needs to show progress or retrieve completed generations later.

### Pricing and Resource Packs

BytePlus’ Seedance 2.0 pricing is handled through token/resource-pack logic. The official Seedance product page lists a [Light Plan and Production Plan](https://www.byteplus.com/en/product/seedance) with token-based pricing, including a Light Plan at $30.10 for 7 million tokens, described as generating around 28 x 480p videos, and a Production Plan at $43.00 for 10 million tokens.

The [ModelArk resource pack documentation](https://docs.byteplus.com/en/docs/ModelArk/1538981) gives more detail. It lists Dreamina Seedance 2.0 resource packs at $4.30 for 1 million tokens, $43 for 10 million tokens, and $430 for 100 million tokens. It also lists Dreamina Seedance 2.0 fast packs at $3.
30 for 1 million tokens, $33 for 10 million tokens, and $330 for 100 million tokens. The same document explains that token deduction varies depending on whether video input is included and whether the output is 480p/720p or 1080p.

My review of the pricing model is mixed but mostly positive. On the positive side, token packs make sense for developers and teams because they can budget usage, test workflows, and separate “standard” from “fast” usage. On the negative side, token-based pricing for video can be less intuitive for casual creators. A creator wants to know: “How many usable 15-second clips can I make for $50?” A developer is more comfortable calculating usage, input type, resolution, retry rate, and cost per successful asset.

That is why BytePlus feels more naturally suited to teams and builders than to purely casual users. The pricing is not impossible to understand, but it is clearly designed for usage-based production rather than a simple consumer subscription.

results.title: Seedance 2.0 Pricing | Segmind
excerpts:
# Seedance 2.0 Pricing

Cinematic AI videos with native audio and multi-shot narratives.

llms.txt

~255.47s

Playground API Pricing

~255.47s

## Simple, Transparent Pricing

Pay only for what you use. No hidden fees, no commitments.

|Input Type |Input Tokens |Output Tokens |
| --- | --- | --- |
|Text or image input |Free |$7.0 per million tokens |
|Video input |Free |$4.3 per million tokens |

View Pricing Plans

Need more credits? [Buy credits](https://cloud.segmind.com/console/billing)

## How Seedance 2.0 pricing works

Seedance 2.0 pricing is based on **input type** , **resolution** (480p, 720p, 1080p, or 4k), **aspect ratio** , and **video duration** (4–15 seconds). Billing is token-based on the generated video.

There are two input modes:

* • **Text / Image-to-video** — generate from a text prompt or reference image(s). Both use the same rate, and the per-second cost is stable for a given resolution and aspect ratio.
* • **Video-to-video** — generate using a reference video clip.
Billed at a lower per-token rate, but the reference video itself adds tokens, so the effective per-second cost is variable and typically a bit higher than text/image (see below).

#### Text / Image-to-video — Per-Second Rates

Multiply by your clip duration to get the total cost.

|Resolution |16:9 |4:3 |1:1 |3:4 |9:16 |21:9 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|480p |$0.0703/s |$0.0691/s |$0.0672/s |$0.0691/s |$0.0703/s |$0.0703/s |
|720p |$0.1512/s |$0.1522/s |$0.1512/s |$0.1522/s |$0.1512/s |$0.1519/s |
|1080p |$0.34/s |$0.34/s |$0.34/s |$0.34/s |$0.34/s |$0.34/s |
|4k |$1.3721/s |$1.3721/s |$1.3721/s |$1.3721/s |$1.3721/s |$1.3721/s |

#### Video-to-video — Typical Rates

Video-to-video cost depends on your reference video (its resolution and length add tokens), so it isn't a single fixed per-second rate. Typical cost per second of generated output:

|Resolution |Typical |Range |
| --- | --- | --- |
|480p |~$0.09/s |$0.07 – $0.13/s |
|720p |~$0.19/s |$0.16 – $0.25/s |
|1080p |~$0.41/s |$0.35 – $0.50/s |

#### Quick Cost Examples

|Input Type |Resolution |Aspect Ratio |Duration |Cost |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|Text / Image-to-video |480p |16:9 |5s |$0.35 |
|Text / Image-to-video |720p |16:9 |5s |$0.76 |
|Text / Image-to-video |720p |16:9 |10s |$1.51 |
|Text / Image-to-video |1080p |16:9 |5s |$1.70 |
|Text / Image-to-video |4k |16:9 |5s |$6.86 |
|Video-to-video |480p |16:9 |5s |~$0.45 |
|Video-to-video |720p |16:9 |5s |~$0.95 |

#### Important Notes

* • **Audio is free** — enabling audio generation does not affect pricing.
* • **Text / Image-to-video scales linearly** — a 10s clip costs exactly 2× a 5s clip at the same resolution and aspect ratio.
* • **Video-to-video cost varies with your reference video** — a longer or higher-resolution input adds tokens, so cost doesn't scale on output duration alone.
* • **Resolution is the main cost lever** — aspect-ratio impact is minimal; 480p → 720p → 1080p → 4k is what materially changes cost.

#### Cost Optimization Tips

* • **480p for drafts, higher res for delivery** — iterate at 480p, render finals at 720p/1080p.
* • **Keep reference videos short** for video-to-video — input length feeds the token count.
* • **Choose aspect ratio by platform** : 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for Reels/TikTok/Shorts, 1:1 for social square — cost difference is negligible.

#### Example Scenario

A team producing 30 clips/day at 9:16, 720p, 5 seconds (text-to-video) spends about **$22.7/day** ($0.756 × 30), or roughly **$680/month** .

720p text/image-to-video comparison. Segmind prices vary slightly by aspect ratio; this uses the lower 720p rate. [Source](https://www.segmind.com/models/seedance-2.0/pricing)

Credit Packs

## LumiYing credit packs

The lower your effective cost per credit, the cheaper each Seedance 2.0 generation becomes. Credits never expire and can be used across all supported video and image models.

$69.9

4,500 credits

$0.0155 per credit

How To Read It

## Official API price vs LumiYing price

### Official API is a baseline
BytePlus ModelArk is the official reference, but many teams compare real public purchase paths: third-party APIs, model routers, and credit bundles.

### LumiYing uses the best credit value

The LumiYing dollar estimates use the best-value Max pack, so power users see the lowest effective per-second price.

### Competitor prices are public offers

Competitor values are normalized from public per-second prices or duration-based API prices from larger generation platforms.

[View official BytePlus resource-pack pricing](https://docs.byteplus.com/en/docs/ModelArk/2191775)

FAQ

## Seedance 2.0 Pricing FAQ

### What is the official Seedance 2.0 API price?

BytePlus ModelArk lists Dreamina-Seedance-2.0 resource-pack token rates from $4.3 per 1M tokens with video input and $7 per 1M tokens without video input for 720p. The same official resource-pack page lists 1080p at $4.7/$7.7 per 1M tokens and Seedance 2.0 fast at $3.3/$5.6 per 1M tokens.
Final official charges depend on token usage and order details shown by BytePlus.

### How does LumiYing convert official pricing into something easier to use?

LumiYing uses a credit system instead of asking creators to estimate API token usage. Using the best-value Max pack, Seedance 2.0 Fast 720p starts at $0.1553 per second.

### Why compare against fal.ai and Segmind instead of only the official API?

The official API is the upstream reference, but many users do not buy directly from BytePlus. They buy through larger public API platforms, model routers, and generation infrastructure providers. Comparing those retail paths shows where LumiYing is more competitive for actual creators.

### What is the lowest paid way to run Seedance 2.0 on LumiYing?

The Starter pack is the lowest paid entry at $19.9. Using the best-value Max pack rate for comparison, a short Seedance 2.0 Fast 720p generation starts at 40 credits for 4 seconds, about $0.6213.

results.title: Seedance 2.0 API Pricing: 46 CNY/Million Tokens (~1 CNY/Second) – Official ByteDance Costs | AICost Blog
excerpts:
AICost Logo AICost

Models Product List Submit Calculator Compare Blog

Back to Blog

Blog March 5, 2026

# Seedance 2.0 API Pricing: 46 CNY/Million Tokens (~1 CNY/Second) – Official ByteDance Costs

Seedance 2.0 API Pricing: 46 CNY/Million Tokens (~1 CNY/Second) – Official ByteDance Costs

## Key Takeaways

* **Official Pricing (announced March 4, 2026)** : Pure video generation costs 46 CNY per million tokens; video input/editing mode costs 28 CNY per million tokens.
* **Real-World Cost** : A standard 15-second clip consumes ~308,880 tokens, equating to approximately **1 CNY per second** for pure generation.
* **Availability Alert** : Despite published pricing, Seedance 2.0 **does not support API calls yet** — limited to free experience quota only.
* **Free Trial Value** : New Volcengine users receive 5 million tokens, enough for roughly 16 full 15-second clips at zero cost.
* **Token Efficiency Insight** : Video editing mode saves ~39% on token costs by reusing reference inputs, making iterative workflows far more economical.

## Official Pricing Structure

ByteDance’s Volcengine platform published the Seedance 2.0 (Doubao-Seedance-2.0) pricing on March 4, 2026, using a transparent token-based model instead of flat per-minute fees common in competing tools.

**Pure Video Generation** (text, image, or audio input only): **46 CNY / 1,000,000 tokens**

**Video Input / Editing Mode** (reference video + prompts): **28 CNY / 1,000,000 tokens**

This dual structure rewards creators who leverage reference videos — the lower rate reflects reduced generative workload since the model reprocesses existing frames rather than building from scratch.

## How Token Consumption Actually Works

Benchmarks shared in official announcements reveal consistent scaling:

* A typical **15-second video** requires approximately **308,880 tokens** .

Calculation for pure generation:
308,880 ÷ 1,000,000 × 46 = **14\.21 CNY** (≈ **0\.95 CNY per second** , rounded to 1 CNY in community reports).

For editing mode:

308,880 ÷ 1,000,000 × 28 = **8\.65 CNY** for the same 15-second clip.

Token usage scales primarily with duration, resolution (480p/720p/1080p), and input complexity. Audio generation and multi-reference images add modest overhead, but the model’s unified multimodal architecture keeps totals predictable compared to separate-stage pipelines.

## Real-World Cost Examples

|Video Length |Est. Tokens |Pure Generation (CNY) |Editing Mode (CNY) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|5 seconds |~103,000 |4\.74 |2\.88 |
|15 seconds |308,880 |14\.21 |8\.65 |
|30 seconds |~617,760 |28\.42 |17\.30 |
|60 seconds |~1,235,520 |56\.83 |34\.59 |

_Assumes linear scaling based on the 15-second benchmark; actual usage may vary ±10–15% with complex camera movements or 1080p output._

These figures position Seedance 2.

results.title: Seedance 2.0: Features, Access, Pricing and Review (June 2026)
excerpts:
1 is better for Vertex AI and Gemini API buyers.
* **Cinematic value alternative:** Kling 3.0 deserves a direct test when short-form cinematic output and value matter.
* **Avatar video:** HeyGen is the better fit for presenter-led sales, training, and localization videos.
* **Low-risk social effects:** Pika is simpler for quick social clips and creative effects.

## Pricing And Access

Do not reuse old consumer-plan numbers for Seedance unless they are tied to a verified official route. The current source-backed pricing anchor AiPedia can cite is BytePlus ModelArk’s resource-pack documentation, which lists Dreamina Seedance 2.0 and Dreamina Seedance 2.0 fast resource packs by token quantity.

|Route |What to verify |Source-backed status |
| --- | --- | --- |
|ByteDance Seed page |Model identity and official positioning |Verified June 12, 2026 |
|BytePlus ModelArk |API/product access and docs |Verified June 12, 2026 |

...

* **No full production suite:** The model may be excellent, but production teams still need editing, storage, approvals, brand controls, and export workflows.
 ## Methodology

This page was produced by the aipedia.wiki editorial pipeline, an automated system that ingests vendor documentation, verifies pricing and model details against primary sources, and generates the editorial analysis you are reading. No individual human wrote this review. Scoring follows the four-dimension rubric at [/about/scoring/](https://aipedia.wiki/about/scoring/) (Utility x Value x Moat x Longevity, unweighted average). Last verified 2026-06-12 against [ByteDance Seedance 2.0](https://seed.bytedance.com/en/seedance2_0) , the [official launch post](https://seed.bytedance.com/blog/seedance-2-0-official-launch) , and the [BytePlus ModelArk API reference](https://docs.byteplus.com/api/docs/ModelArk/1520757) . ## FAQ

**Is Seedance 2.0 official?** Yes. Seedance 2.0 is official through ByteDance Seed.
The official page is on `seed.bytedance.com` .

**Is seedance.ai official?** No. As of June 12, 2026, the public `seedance.ai` page says it is independent and not affiliated with ByteDance or its products.

**Does Seedance 2.0 have an API?** BytePlus ModelArk documents video generation APIs and exposes Seedance 2.0 through its product surface. Validate the exact model ID, region, rights, and pricing before production use.

**Is Seedance 2.0 better than Kling 3.0 or Veo 3.1?** AiPedia would test Seedance 2.0 first for raw model quality on June 6, 2026. Serious buyers should still compare it against Kling 3.0 and Veo 3.1 on their own prompts because each model has different strengths. ## Sources

* [ByteDance Seedance 2.0](https://seed.bytedance.com/en/seedance2_0) (verified 2026-06-12)
* [Seedance 2.0 official launch](https://seed.bytedance.com/blog/seedance-2-0-official-launch) (verified 2026-06-12)
* [BytePlus ModelArk](https://www.byteplus.
com/en/product/modelark) (verified 2026-06-12)
* [BytePlus Seedance 2.0 API reference](https://docs.byteplus.com/api/docs/ModelArk/1520757) (verified 2026-06-12)
* [BytePlus Seedance 2.0 resource packs](https://docs.byteplus.com/api/docs/ModelArk/2191775) (verified 2026-06-12)
* [Seedance.ai independent disclosure](https://www.seedance.ai/) (verified 2026-06-12)
 ## Related

* **Category:** AI Video Generation
* **Compare:** Veo vs Seedance · Pika vs Seedance · HeyGen vs Seedance · Runway vs Kling vs Seedance vs Veo
* **Alternatives:** Kling 3.0 · Google Veo 3.1 · Runway · Pika · HeyGen

# Seedance 2.0 Pricing: Is It Free? Complete Cost Breakdown (2026)

Is Seedance 2.0 free? Yes — with limits. Every pricing option explained: Dreamina free tier, BytePlus API costs, and third-party platforms compared side by side.

The most common question I get after people see Seedance 2.0 demos: "How much does it cost?" The answer surprised me too. Most people can start using Seedance 2.0 today for free — the real question is which plan fits your actual workflow.

## Is Seedance 2.0 Free? (Quick Answer)

Yes. Seedance 2.0 is free to use right now through multiple platforms. ByteDance offers free daily credits on Dreamina with no credit card required.
For developers, BytePlus gives you 2 million free API tokens on signup.

Here is the quick breakdown before I go deep:

|Plan |Cost |Best For |
| --- | --- | --- |
|**Dreamina Free** |$0/day |Creators testing Seedance 2.0 |
|**Dreamina Credits** |Pay per use |Regular creators |
|**BytePlus API** |From $0.010/sec |Developers and builders |
|**Third-Party Platforms** |From $19/month |High-volume creators |

Seedance 2.0 Pricing Guide showing three tier cards on dark background: Free at $0 per month with Get Started button in green, Credits at $19 per month with Buy Credits and Advanced Features listed, API at $49 per month with API Access and High Limits — golden gradient card borders with tech aesthetic

Start free — no credit card required

The fastest way to try Seedance 2.0 at zero cost is [Dreamina](https://dreamina.capcut.com) . Create a free account and you get daily credits immediately — enough for 2–3 videos per day to test your workflow.
## All the Free Ways to Use Seedance 2.0

I have tested every free option. Here is what each one actually gives you.

### Dreamina Free Tier — What You Get

Dreamina is ByteDance's international AI creation platform and the primary free access point for Seedance 2.0. The free tier gives you:

* Daily free credits that reset every 24 hours
* Access to Seedance 2.0 (full model, not a limited demo)
* Both text-to-video and image-to-video generation
* 1080p output quality on the free tier
* No credit card required, no time limit on your account

**Real-world output** : The free tier generates approximately 2–3 standard 5-second video clips per day. Enough to test Seedance 2.0 for personal projects and learn the prompting system.

# ByteDance announces API pricing for AI video model Seedance 2.0

[Cara Yu](https://cntechpost.com/author/xiaofen/) • Mar 4, 2026 at 6:46 PM UTC

0 0

> * Although pricing has been announced, the Volcengine website indicates that the model does not yet support widespread API access.
> * The model is currently restricted to internal use and an initial group of invited enterprise clients.
> 
> 

A screenshot from the Volcengine website. (A screenshot from the Volcengine website.)

ByteDance's cloud computing arm, Volcengine, has unveiled the API pricing for its new-generation multimodal video generation model, Seedance 2.0.

The cost for pure video generation is 46 yuan ($6.66) per million tokens, while video editing is priced at 28 yuan, according to the Volcengine [website](https://exp.volcengine.com/ark?launch=seedance-2-0) .
Generating a 15-second video consumes about 308,880 tokens. This translates to a pure video generation cost of about 1 yuan per second.

Despite the published pricing, the Volcengine website shows that the model is temporarily unavailable for broad API access.

Some Chinese media reports suggest that Seedance 2.0 is currently closed to third-party tool developers and is restricted to ByteDance's internal use.

Furthermore, the model has only been integrated by an initial batch of enterprise clients, including a leading comic-to-animation company.

Officially launched on February 12 this year, Seedance 2.0 adopts a unified multimodal architecture for joint audio and video generation.

It supports four input modalities — text, image, audio, and video — and is capable of generating 15-second, high-quality, multi-shot audio-visual content.

However, the powerful AI tool is facing severe copyright challenges.
In February, The Walt Disney Company accused ByteDance of using its works to train the model without permission.

Subsequently, ByteDance's Japanese subsidiary announced adjustments to the Seedance 2.0 service. The move aims to prevent users from generating videos that infringe on the intellectual property rights of Disney, "Ultraman," and other related IPs.
